meaning: Formal language and structured ways of discussing ideas in an academic setting
definition: Formal language and structured ways of discussing ideas in an academic setting
example: Students were taught phrases for academic discourse such as 'In contrast to...'
exampleHindi: छात्रों को अकादमिक प्रवचन के लिए वाक्यांश सिखाए गए जैसे 'इसके विपरीत...'

meaning: To accept or admit the existence or truth of something.
definition: To recognize or admit the truth or existence of something.
example: A fair argument acknowledges the strongest objections to its own position.
exampleHindi: एक निष्पक्ष तर्क अपनी स्थिति पर सबसे मजबूत आपत्तियों को स्वीकार करता है।

meaning: To examine something in detail to understand it better
definition: To examine something in detail to understand it better
example: The essay required students to analyse the themes of the novel.
exampleHindi: निबंध में छात्रों को उपन्यास के विषयों का विश्लेषण करने की आवश्यकता थी।

meaning: The direct opposite of something; a contrast of opposing ideas.
definition: The direct opposite of something; a contrast of opposing ideas.
example: Reckless spending is the antithesis of sound financial planning.
exampleHindi: बेतहाशा खर्च करना अच्छी वित्तीय योजना का विरोधी है।

meaning: बहस करना
definition: To express disagreement in a loud or angry way.
example: The essay argues that climate change requires immediate policy intervention.
exampleHindi: निबंध में तर्क दिया गया है कि जलवायु परिवर्तन के लिए तत्काल नीतिगत हस्तक्षेप की आवश्यकता है।

meaning: To present reasons and evidence in a compelling manner that convinces others.
definition: To present reasons and evidence in a compelling manner that convinces others.
example: The debate team learned to argue persuasively even on topics they disagreed with.
exampleHindi: वाद-विवाद टीम ने उन विषयों पर भी प्रेरक बहस करना सीखा, जिनसे वे असहमत थे।

meaning: To express an idea or feeling clearly and effectively in words.
definition: Able to express thoughts and ideas clearly and effectively in speech or writing.
example: A good writer can articulate complex ideas in simple, clear language.
exampleHindi: एक अच्छा लेखक जटिल विचारों को सरल, स्पष्ट भाषा में व्यक्त कर सकता है।

meaning: To state a fact or belief confidently and forcefully (replaces the conversational 'say strongly').
definition: To state or declare something confidently and forcefully.
example: She continued to assert her innocence despite the evidence presented.
exampleHindi: सबूत पेश किए जाने के बावजूद वह अपनी बेगुनाही का दावा करती रही।

meaning: A confident and forceful statement of fact or belief.
definition: A confident and forceful statement of fact or belief.
example: His assertion that crime has increased is not supported by statistics.
exampleHindi: उनका यह दावा कि अपराध बढ़ा है, आंकड़ों से समर्थित नहीं है।

meaning: To raise a difficult or sensitive subject for discussion (replaces the conversational 'bring up a topic').
definition: To raise a difficult or sensitive subject for discussion (replaces the conversational 'bring up a topic').
example: It was hard for him to broach the subject of a budget deficit with his boss.
exampleHindi: उनके लिए अपने बॉस के साथ बजट घाटे के विषय पर चर्चा करना कठिन था।

meaning: The duty to provide evidence to prove a claim that you have made.
definition: Making a claim that needs justification, then demanding that the opponent justifies the opposite of the claim.
example: If you accuse someone of lying, the burden of proof is on you, not on them.
exampleHindi: यदि आप किसी पर झूठ बोलने का आरोप लगाते हैं, तो सबूत देने का भार आप पर है, उन पर नहीं।

meaning: To dispute the truth or validity of something (replaces the conversational 'question' or 'argue with').
definition: To dispute the truth or validity of an idea or belief.
example: New discoveries challenge the traditional view of dinosaur extinction.
exampleHindi: नई खोजें डायनासोर के विलुप्त होने के पारंपरिक दृष्टिकोण को चुनौती देती हैं।

meaning: To find a way around an obstacle or to avoid dealing with it directly.
definition: To find a way around an obstacle or to avoid dealing with it directly.
example: The argument attempts to circumvent the need for empirical evidence.
exampleHindi: यह तर्क अनुभवजन्य साक्ष्य की आवश्यकता को दरकिनार करने का प्रयास करता है।

meaning: A question that has a specific correct answer, often yes or no
definition: A question that has a specific correct answer, often yes or no
example: The teacher asked a closed question: 'What is the capital of France?'
exampleHindi: शिक्षक ने एक बंद प्रश्न पूछा: 'फ्रांस की राजधानी क्या है?'

meaning: Clear, logical, and convincing; compelling.
definition: Clear, logical, and convincing.
example: She presented a cogent argument that left little room for doubt.
exampleHindi: उसने एक ठोस तर्क प्रस्तुत किया जिससे संदेह की कोई गुंजाइश नहीं बची।

meaning: A systematic error in thinking that affects the decisions and judgments people make.
definition: A systematic pattern of deviation from rational thinking caused by mental shortcuts or emotional influences.
example: Confirmation bias is a cognitive bias where you only look for facts that agree with you.
exampleHindi: पुष्टिकरण पूर्वाग्रह एक संज्ञानात्मक पूर्वाग्रह है जहां आप केवल उन तथ्यों की तलाश करते हैं जो आपसे सहमत हैं।

meaning: Logical and consistent; easy to understand because well-structured.
definition: Logical and consistent; forming a unified whole.
example: A coherent argument flows naturally from one point to the next.
exampleHindi: एक सुसंगत तर्क स्वाभाविक रूप से एक बिंदु से दूसरे बिंदु तक प्रवाहित होता है।

meaning: Evoking interest, attention, or admiration in a powerfully irresistible way.
definition: Evoking interest, attention, or admiration in a powerfully irresistible way.
example: He made a compelling case for revising the curriculum.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने पाठ्यक्रम को संशोधित करने के लिए एक सम्मोहक मामला बनाया।

meaning: To admit that something is true or valid after first denying or resisting it (replaces the conversational 'give in' or 'admit').
definition: To admit that something is true or valid after first denying or resisting it (replaces the conversational 'give in' or 'admit').
example: The candidate refused to concede the election until all votes were counted.
exampleHindi: उम्मीदवार ने सभी वोटों की गिनती होने तक चुनाव लड़ने से इनकार कर दिया।

meaning: Admitting that a point made by your opponent is true or valid, even if you disagree overall.
definition: A thing that is granted, especially in response to demands; a thing conceded.
example: Making a small concession can make you look fair and reasonable in a debate.
exampleHindi: एक छोटी सी रियायत देने से आप बहस में निष्पक्ष और उचित दिख सकते हैं।

meaning: Specific, definite, and based on facts rather than ideas or feelings.
definition: Specific, definite, and based on facts rather than ideas or feelings.
example: Support your argument with concrete examples, not vague statements.
exampleHindi: अपने तर्क का समर्थन ठोस उदाहरणों से करें, अस्पष्ट बयानों से नहीं।

meaning: To be of the same opinion or agree (replaces the conversational 'agree').
definition: To be of the same opinion or agree (replaces the conversational 'agree').
example: The board members concur that immediate action must be taken.
exampleHindi: बोर्ड के सदस्य सहमत हैं कि तत्काल कार्रवाई की जानी चाहिए।

meaning: General agreement reached by a group after discussion
definition: A general agreement.
example: After the group discussion, students reached a consensus on the best solution.
exampleHindi: समूह चर्चा के बाद छात्र सर्वोत्तम समाधान पर आम सहमति पर पहुंचे।

meaning: Feedback that identifies weaknesses while also offering suggestions for improvement
definition: Feedback that identifies weaknesses while also offering suggestions for improvement
example: Peer review sessions practised giving constructive criticism in a respectful way.
exampleHindi: सहकर्मी समीक्षा सत्रों में सम्मानजनक तरीके से रचनात्मक आलोचना देने का अभ्यास किया गया।

meaning: To assert something as a position in an argument; to maintain firmly.
definition: Assert something as a position in an argument.
example: The author contends that modern education fails to teach critical thinking.
exampleHindi: लेखक का तर्क है कि आधुनिक शिक्षा आलोचनात्मक सोच सिखाने में विफल रहती है।

meaning: A point of view put forward in an argument; a position one defends.
definition: A point of view put forward in an argument; a position one defends.
example: Her central contention is that poverty is a policy choice, not an inevitability.
exampleHindi: उनका मुख्य तर्क यह है कि गरीबी एक नीतिगत विकल्प है, अपरिहार्यता नहीं।

meaning: Causing or likely to cause argument or disagreement; disputed.
definition: Causing or likely to cause argument or disagreement; disputed.
example: The proposal was highly contentious, dividing experts into two camps.
exampleHindi: यह प्रस्ताव अत्यधिक विवादास्पद था, जिसने विशेषज्ञों को दो खेमों में विभाजित कर दिया।

meaning: To oppose an action, decision, or theory as mistaken or wrong (replaces the conversational 'fight against' or 'argue about').
definition: To oppose an action, decision, or theory as mistaken or wrong (replaces the conversational 'fight against' or 'argue about').
example: The heirs decided to contest the validity of the will in court.
exampleHindi: वारिसों ने वसीयत की वैधता को अदालत में चुनौती देने का फैसला किया।

meaning: To deny or state the opposite of what someone else has said.
definition: To say or do something that is opposite to what has been said before.
example: The new findings directly contradict the earlier published results.
exampleHindi: नए निष्कर्ष सीधे तौर पर पहले प्रकाशित परिणामों का खंडन करते हैं।

meaning: A statement or situation where two things are completely opposed, showing that one must be false.
definition: A statement or situation where two things are completely opposed, showing that one must be false.
example: There is a clear contradiction between saying you want to save money and buying luxury items.
exampleHindi: यह कहने के बीच कि आप पैसे बचाना चाहते हैं और विलासिता की वस्तुएं खरीदना स्पष्ट विरोधाभास है।

meaning: Capable of causing someone to believe that something is true or real.
definition: Capable of causing someone to believe that something is true or real.
example: A convincing argument requires both strong evidence and clear logic.
exampleHindi: एक ठोस तर्क के लिए मजबूत साक्ष्य और स्पष्ट तर्क दोनों की आवश्यकता होती है।

meaning: To support or confirm a statement or story by providing fresh evidence.
definition: To confirm or give support to a statement, theory, or finding.
example: Three other witnesses were called to corroborate the victim's story.
exampleHindi: पीड़िता की कहानी की पुष्टि के लिए तीन अन्य गवाहों को बुलाया गया।

meaning: An argument made to oppose or rebut another argument.
definition: An argument made to oppose or rebut another argument.
example: A strong essay acknowledges the counterargument and addresses it directly.
exampleHindi: एक सशक्त निबंध प्रतिवाद को स्वीकार करता है और उसे सीधे संबोधित करता है।

meaning: A specific example that proves a general rule or claim is false.
definition: A specific example that proves a general rule or claim is false.
example: Finding one black swan is a counterexample that disproves the rule that all swans are white.
exampleHindi: एक काले हंस को ढूंढना एक प्रति-उदाहरण है जो इस नियम को अस्वीकार करता है कि सभी हंस सफेद होते हैं।

meaning: A conversation in which students and teachers explore ideas together
definition: A conversation in which students and teachers explore ideas together
example: The class held a discussion about the causes of environmental pollution.
exampleHindi: कक्षा में पर्यावरण प्रदूषण के कारणों पर चर्चा हुई।

meaning: To question or argue against the truth or validity of something.
definition: To question or argue against the truth or validity of something.
example: Several economists dispute the claim that austerity measures promote growth.
exampleHindi: कई अर्थशास्त्री इस दावे पर विवाद करते हैं कि मितव्ययता के उपाय विकास को बढ़ावा देते हैं।

meaning: To hold or express opinions that are at variance with those previously or officially held (replaces the conversational 'disagree').
definition: To hold or express opinions that are at variance with those previously or officially held (replaces the conversational 'disagree').
example: Two judges chose to dissent from the majority ruling.
exampleHindi: दो न्यायाधीशों ने बहुमत के फैसले से असहमति जताई।

meaning: To present an argument or theory in further detail (replaces the conversational 'say more' or 'go into detail').
definition: To develop or present a theory or argument in further detail.
example: Could you elaborate on the third point you made in your report?
exampleHindi: क्या आप अपनी रिपोर्ट में बताए गए तीसरे बिंदु के बारे में विस्तार से बता सकते हैं?

meaning: To present and explain a theory or idea systematically and in detail (replaces the conversational 'explain in detail').
definition: To present and explain a theory or idea systematically and in detail.
example: He expounded on his theories of economic growth during the lecture.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने व्याख्यान के दौरान आर्थिक विकास के अपने सिद्धांतों को उजागर किया।

meaning: To prove that a statement or theory is false (or to alter data dishonestly).
definition: To prove that a statement or theory is false (or to alter data dishonestly).
example: Karl Popper argued that scientific theories must be open to being falsified.
exampleHindi: कार्ल पॉपर ने तर्क दिया कि वैज्ञानिक सिद्धांतों को गलत साबित होने के लिए खुला होना चाहिए।

meaning: To make something clear by using examples, charts, or evidence.
definition: Explain or make something clear by using examples, charts, pictures, etc.
example: The case study illustrates how theory can break down in practice.
exampleHindi: केस स्टडी से पता चलता है कि सिद्धांत व्यवहार में कैसे विफल हो सकता है।

meaning: To prove that an argument or claim is incorrect, illogical, or officially void.
definition: To prove that an argument or claim is incorrect, illogical, or officially void.
example: Finding a single error in the math can invalidate the entire calculation.
exampleHindi: गणित में एक भी त्रुटि खोजने से पूरी गणना अमान्य हो सकती है।

meaning: To show or prove to be right or reasonable.
definition: To show or prove to be right or reasonable.
example: You must justify your choice of methodology in the research design chapter.
exampleHindi: आपको अनुसंधान डिज़ाइन अध्याय में कार्यप्रणाली की अपनी पसंद को उचित ठहराना होगा।

meaning: Expressed clearly; easy to understand.
definition: Expressed clearly; easy to understand.
example: A lucid argument requires precise language and a clear structure.
exampleHindi: एक स्पष्ट तर्क के लिए सटीक भाषा और स्पष्ट संरचना की आवश्यकता होती है।

meaning: To make less severe, serious, or painful; to lessen the impact of.
definition: To make less severe, serious, or painful; to lessen the impact of.
example: Acknowledging limitations in your study helps mitigate criticism.
exampleHindi: अपने अध्ययन की सीमाओं को स्वीकार करने से आलोचना को कम करने में मदद मिलती है।

meaning: To make ineffective or invalid; to nullify a claim or argument.
definition: To make ineffective or invalid; to nullify a claim or argument.
example: The new data negates the original findings entirely.
exampleHindi: नया डेटा मूल निष्कर्षों को पूरी तरह से नकार देता है।

meaning: A question that requires more than a yes/no answer and promotes thinking
definition: A question that requires more than a yes/no answer and promotes thinking
example: Open-ended questions like 'Why do you think so?' encourage deeper thinking.
exampleHindi: ओपन-एंडेड प्रश्न जैसे 'आप ऐसा क्यों सोचते हैं?' गहरी सोच को प्रोत्साहित करें.

meaning: A spoken report or talk delivered to the class by a student
definition: A spoken report or talk delivered to the class by a student
example: Each student gave a five-minute oral presentation on their chosen topic.
exampleHindi: प्रत्येक छात्र ने अपने चुने हुए विषय पर पांच मिनट की मौखिक प्रस्तुति दी।

meaning: To cause someone to do or believe something through reasoning or argument.
definition: To cause someone to do or believe something through reasoning or argument.
example: A well-structured argument should persuade even a skeptical reader.
exampleHindi: एक सुव्यवस्थित तर्क को संशयवादी पाठक को भी आश्वस्त करना चाहिए।

meaning: Good at convincing someone to do or believe something through reasoning.
definition: Good at convincing someone to do or believe something through reasoning.
example: Persuasive writing combines emotional appeal with logical argument.
exampleHindi: प्रेरक लेखन भावनात्मक अपील को तार्किक तर्क के साथ जोड़ता है।

meaning: A strong verbal or written attack on someone or something; contentious argument or controversy
definition: A strong verbal or written attack on someone or something; contentious argument or controversy
example: Her book was a blistering polemic against the pharmaceutical industry's pricing practices.
exampleHindi: उनकी पुस्तक फार्मास्युटिकल उद्योग की मूल्य निर्धारण प्रथाओं के खिलाफ एक तीखा विवाद था।

meaning: To ask a question, especially to start or continue a discussion
definition: To ask a question, especially to start or continue a discussion
example: The teacher posed a question to check if students understood the concept.
exampleHindi: शिक्षक ने यह जांचने के लिए एक प्रश्न पूछा कि क्या छात्रों ने अवधारणा को समझा है।

meaning: To suggest or assume the existence, fact, or truth of something as a basis for reasoning.
definition: A suggested truth or principle accepted as the basis of an argument.
example: The economist postulated that lower taxes stimulate growth.
exampleHindi: अर्थशास्त्री ने माना कि कम कर विकास को प्रोत्साहित करते हैं।

meaning: To say what you think will happen based on available information
definition: To say what you think will happen based on available information
example: Students were asked to predict the outcome of the experiment before conducting it.
exampleHindi: छात्रों को प्रयोग करने से पहले उसके परिणाम की भविष्यवाणी करने के लिए कहा गया था।

meaning: A statement or assumption that forms the basis of an argument.
definition: A previous statement or proposition from which another is inferred or follows as a conclusion.
example: The entire argument rests on a flawed premise.
exampleHindi: पूरा तर्क एक त्रुटिपूर्ण आधार पर आधारित है।

meaning: A statement that expresses an idea or argument to be considered.
definition: A declarative statement that is either true or false.
example: The proposition that all people are equal before the law is central to democracy.
exampleHindi: यह प्रस्ताव कि कानून के समक्ष सभी लोग समान हैं, लोकतंत्र का केंद्र है।

meaning: To stimulate or give rise to a reaction or emotion, typically a strong one (replaces the conversational 'cause' or 'stir up').
definition: To stimulate or give rise to a reaction or emotion, typically a strong one (replaces the conversational 'cause' or 'stir up').
example: His controversial statements were designed to provoke a debate.
exampleHindi: उनके विवादास्पद बयान बहस भड़काने के लिए तैयार किए गए थे।

meaning: To make a statement less absolute by adding conditions or reservations.
definition: To make a statement less absolute by adding conditions or reservations.
example: He qualified his statement by noting that exceptions exist.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने अपने कथन को यह कहते हुए प्रमाणित किया कि अपवाद मौजूद हैं।

meaning: A set of reasons or a logical basis for a course of action or belief.
definition: A set of reasons or a logical basis for a course of action or a belief (replaces the conversational 'reason' or 'thinking').
example: The committee explained the rationale behind its decision to cut funding.
exampleHindi: समिति ने फंडिंग में कटौती के अपने फैसले के पीछे का तर्क समझाया।

meaning: Based on logic or good sense.
definition: Based on logic or good sense.
example: Her reasoned response to the criticism demonstrated academic maturity.
exampleHindi: आलोचना पर उनकी तर्कपूर्ण प्रतिक्रिया ने अकादमिक परिपक्वता का प्रदर्शन किया।

meaning: A response that contradicts or proves a claim or argument wrong.
definition: A response that contradicts or proves a claim or argument wrong.
example: Her rebuttal effectively dismantled every point the opposition had raised.
exampleHindi: उनके खंडन ने विपक्ष द्वारा उठाए गए हर बिंदु को प्रभावी ढंग से नष्ट कर दिया।

meaning: To summarize and state again the main points of something (replaces the conversational 'go over again' or 'sum up').
definition: To summarize and state again the main points of something (replaces the conversational 'go over again' or 'sum up').
example: Let me recapitulate the main findings before we open the floor to questions.
exampleHindi: इससे पहले कि हम प्रश्नों के लिए मंच खोलें, मैं मुख्य निष्कर्षों को दोबारा दोहराना चाहूँगा।

meaning: The act of proving a statement or theory to be wrong or false.
definition: The act of proving a statement or theory to be wrong or false.
example: The scientist published a complete refutation of the old theory.
exampleHindi: वैज्ञानिक ने पुराने सिद्धांत का पूर्ण खंडन प्रकाशित किया।

meaning: To prove a statement or theory to be wrong or false (replaces the conversational 'prove wrong' or 'argue against').
definition: To prove a statement or theory to be wrong or false.
example: The laboratory results refute the claims made by the manufacturer.
exampleHindi: प्रयोगशाला के परिणाम निर्माता द्वारा किए गए दावों का खंडन करते हैं।

meaning: To refuse to accept or be associated with something; to deny firmly.
definition: To refuse to accept or be associated with something; to deny firmly.
example: She repudiated the claim that her research was biased.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने इस दावे को खारिज कर दिया कि उनका शोध पक्षपातपूर्ण था।

meaning: The art of effective or persuasive speaking or writing.
definition: The art of effective or persuasive speaking or writing.
example: Political speeches often rely on powerful rhetoric to move audiences.
exampleHindi: राजनीतिक भाषण अक्सर दर्शकों को प्रभावित करने के लिए शक्तिशाली बयानबाजी पर निर्भर करते हैं।

meaning: A structured academic discussion session led by a teacher or student
definition: A structured academic discussion session led by a teacher or student
example: The seminar on climate change featured student-led presentations and debate.
exampleHindi: जलवायु परिवर्तन पर सेमिनार में छात्र-नेतृत्व वाली प्रस्तुतियाँ और बहसें हुईं।

meaning: To demand or specify something as a condition of an argument or agreement.
definition: To demand or specify something as a condition of an argument or agreement.
example: The author stipulates that freedom must be balanced with responsibility.
exampleHindi: लेखक का कहना है कि स्वतंत्रता को जिम्मेदारी के साथ संतुलित किया जाना चाहिए।

meaning: To provide evidence to support or prove the truth of something.
definition: To provide evidence to support or prove the truth of something.
example: You must substantiate your claims with credible sources.
exampleHindi: आपको विश्वसनीय स्रोतों से अपने दावों की पुष्टि करनी होगी।

meaning: To state the main points of something briefly and clearly
definition: To state the main points of something briefly and clearly
example: After reading the chapter, students were asked to summarise it in five sentences.
exampleHindi: अध्याय को पढ़ने के बाद, छात्रों को इसे पाँच वाक्यों में सारांशित करने के लिए कहा गया।

meaning: A central claim or argument that an essay or paper aims to prove.
definition: A long essay or dissertation involving personal research, written for a university degree.
example: Her thesis argued that climate change is the defining crisis of our time.
exampleHindi: उनकी थीसिस में तर्क दिया गया कि जलवायु परिवर्तन हमारे समय का निर्णायक संकट है।

meaning: A strategy where students think, discuss with a partner, then share with the class
definition: A strategy where students think, discuss with a partner, then share with the class
example: The teacher used think-pair-share to ensure all students participated in discussion.
exampleHindi: यह सुनिश्चित करने के लिए कि सभी छात्र चर्चा में भाग लें, शिक्षक ने थिंक-पेयर-शेयर का उपयोग किया।

meaning: To reluctantly admit that something is true or that you have lost a point.
definition: To reluctantly admit that something is true or that you have lost a point.
example: After seeing the test results, he had to concede that his theory was wrong.
exampleHindi: परीक्षण के परिणाम देखने के बाद उन्हें मानना ​​पड़ा कि उनका सिद्धांत गलत था।

meaning: To argue against or challenge the truth of a statement.
definition: To argue against or challenge the truth of a statement.
example: The defense lawyer disputed the claim that her client was at the scene.
exampleHindi: बचाव पक्ष के वकील ने इस दावे का खंडन किया कि उसका मुवक्किल घटनास्थल पर था।

meaning: To offer arguments or evidence that contradict or oppose a claim.
definition: To offer arguments or evidence that contradict or oppose a claim.
example: The politician asked for a chance to rebut the criticisms made by his rival.
exampleHindi: राजनेता ने अपने प्रतिद्वंद्वी द्वारा की गई आलोचनाओं का खंडन करने का मौका मांगा।

meaning: To prove that a statement, theory, or accusation is wrong.
definition: To prove that a statement, theory, or accusation is wrong.
example: New evidence was found to refute the witness's claims.
exampleHindi: गवाहों के दावों का खंडन करने के लिए नए सबूत मिले।

meaning: To weaken or damage the effectiveness or force of something.
definition: To weaken or damage the effectiveness or force of something.
example: A single contradictory fact can undermine an otherwise strong argument.
exampleHindi: एक भी विरोधाभासी तथ्य अन्यथा मजबूत तर्क को कमजोर कर सकता है।

meaning: To prove that something is correct, acceptable, or logically sound.
definition: To check or prove the accuracy of something; to make or declare legally or officially valid.
example: Further scientific research helped to validate the doctor's new treatment method.
exampleHindi: आगे के वैज्ञानिक अनुसंधान ने डॉक्टर की नई उपचार पद्धति को मान्य करने में मदद की।

meaning: Based on careful thought and good judgment.
definition: Based on careful thought and good judgment.
example: A well-reasoned essay acknowledges counterarguments and addresses them directly.
exampleHindi: एक सुविचारित निबंध प्रतितर्कों को स्वीकार करता है और उन्हें सीधे संबोधित करता है।
